data.title: CENTURY 21 SYSTEM RAISES MORE THAN $2.19 MILLION FOR EASTERSEALS IN 2025, BRINGING LIFETIME SUPPORT TO OVER $143 MILLION
data.description: Today, Century 21 Real Estate LLC revealed that in 2025, the CENTURY 21® System generated $2,194,978 for Easterseals, marking one of its enduring and meaningful charitable partnerships. The total raised showcases the continued success and commitment of the organization in supporting Easterseals.

data.title: Doceree Extends Its Healthcare Intelligence to Clinical Screens, Completing the Point-of-Care Ecosystem with 'Spark for DOOH'
data.description: A recent advancement in TV app technology now allows screen networks to access premium and precise advertising opportunities in the $1.2 billion point-of-care media market. This innovation comes from Doceree, the first AI-powered operating system designed specifically for healthcare marketing. The new technology was revealed on March 5, 2026, in Short Hills, New Jersey.

data.title: Gap Likely To Report Lower Q4 Earnings; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
data.description: Retailer The Gap, Inc. (NYSE: GAP) is set to reveal its Q4 earnings on March 5, post-market. Analysts project earnings to be 45 cents/share, a decrease from 54 cents/share last year. Revenue is estimated at $4.24 billion, up from $4.15 billion in the prior year. Recently, Gap announced a 6% hike in its Q1 dividend. Shares closed at $27.74, up by 1.8% on Wednesday. For more details and analyst ratings, visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga.com.

data.title: CPSC Posts Product Recalls to its Web Site
data.description: On March 5, 2026, in Washington, the CPSC revealed recalls in collaboration with multiple companies. Unique Brands Com is recalling Forever 21 Pajama Pants due to a burn hazard, posing a risk of serious injury or death. Consumers can access recall details at www.cpsc.gov.

data.title: BIOMEMORY ACQUIRES THE ASSETS OF CATALOG, BOOSTING ITS AMBITIONS IN DNA DATA STORAGE AND COMPUTING
data.description: Two leading companies in the DNA data storage and computing market are joining forces to enhance the development of high-density and energy-efficient information systems. The collaboration between Biomemory and another pioneer is set to revolutionize the industry. The partnership, announced on March 5, 2026, is expected to significantly impact the market, leveraging their combined expertise to drive innovation. This move signifies a strategic shift in the field, with a focus on increasing storage capacity and improving computational efficiency. The companies aim to capitalize on this synergy to tap into new opportunities and meet the growing demand for advanced data storage solutions. The consolidation of their resources will propel advancements in DNA data storage technology, setting a new benchmark for the industry. This development is indicative of a transformative period in the market, with projected growth in the coming years.

data.title: Wingspire Equipment Finance Fuels Tier One Automotive Supplier with Large Asset-Backed $45 Million Transaction
data.description: A significant financing deal has been revealed by Wingspire Equipment Finance based in Tustin, Calif. The company, known for offering equipment financing solutions to middle market firms, recently disclosed providing a substantial $45 million equipment term loan to a prominent Tier One automotive parts manufacturer. The client is a well-established international supplier of Tier One auto parts that backs major OEM programs. This financial arrangement was designed as an equipment term loan, utilizing the manufacturer's essential operating assets as collateral. The transaction was overseen by Tom Mu and demonstrates Wingspire's commitment to facilitating large-scale financing deals within the industry.

data.title: ADATA Industrial to Participate in Embedded World 2026
data.description: ADATA Industrial, a top global brand for industrial-grade embedded storage, is set to showcase its innovation at Embedded World 2026 from March 10 to 12 in Nuremberg, Germany. This announcement was made on March 5, 2026.

data.title: Revelio Public Labor Statistics Reports 17k U.S. Jobs Shed in February
data.description: On March 5, 2026, Revelio Labs announced the launch of the January edition of Revelio Public Labor Statistics (RPLS), providing detailed insights into the U.S. labor market. According to the report, there was a decrease of 16,600 jobs in January. This monthly data release aims to offer transparent and dependable information for analysis of labor market trends.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Procare Solutions/
data.description: Procare Solutions has recently published the 2026 Child Care Business Trends Report. This report was released on 04-Mar-2026 through PR Newswire. The company has announced updates to the report. For more information, refer to the complete and corrected release provided by Procare.

data.title: Global Electric Vehicle Industry Set to Surge to Historic Heights by 2033 Across Multiple Segments - Grand View Research, Inc.
data.description: On March 5, 2026, in San Francisco, the electric vehicle (EV) sector is experiencing significant growth and technological advancements, with Grand View Research predicting substantial expansion in key market areas until at least 2030. The industry is set to see a surge in market sectors, with experts expecting unprecedented growth in the coming years.

data.title: Wiring Inglewood for the 2026 World Cup: Next-Gen Smart-City Network to Launch this April
data.description: In Inglewood, California, a unique digital infrastructure network is set to launch in April 2026 to enhance services for five million yearly visitors to the Sports and Entertainment District in preparation for the upcoming FIFA World Cup. The innovative project aims to improve connectivity and support the influx of visitors expected for the event.

data.title: WEST MANUFACTURING ANNOUNCES OFFICIAL MARKET LAUNCH TO SCALE STEEL MODULAR HOUSING ACROSS HIGH-DEMAND U.S. MARKETS
data.description: Today, WEST Manufacturing revealed the launch of its modular manufacturing program aimed at addressing the shortage in middle-income, workforce, disaster-recovery, and infill housing. This initiative is supported by significant new capital and an expanded operating platform to enhance delivery. The company is based in San Diego and the announcement was made on March 5, 2026.

data.title: LeadingResponse’s Surya Chikkala to Speak at Agentic AI Panel in Atlanta on March 12
data.description: In Tampa, Florida, LeadingResponse revealed today that Surya Chikkala, their Chief Digital & Technology Officer, is set to be a highlighted speaker at the "Agentic AI: Power, Promise, and Practical Reality" event on March 12. The event will be held at Comcast Business located at The Battery in Atlanta. Organized by TAG's Cloud Society, the discussion will assemble senior technology and business executives to delve into agentic AI, discussing its practical applications and impact. This initiative aims to uncover the effectiveness and implications of agentic AI on operations.
UAE: Defense systems are currently responding to a missile threat.

data.title: AMA Named Leadership Development Solution of the Year by HR.com
data.description: On March 5, 2026, in New York, the American Management Association (AMA) was recognized as the Leadership Development Solution of the Year by HR.com. This award acknowledges AMA's exceptional leadership training program that aims to cultivate effective leaders who deliver tangible business outcomes. The program stands out for its tailored client training, showcasing AMA's commitment to developing impactful leaders. This achievement solidifies AMA's reputation as a top provider in leadership development, reinforcing its dedication to delivering high-quality training services for businesses.

data.title: ChiroTouch Cloud Announces Fullscript Integration, Connecting Supplements and Labs Inside the EHR
data.description: On March 5, 2026, in San Diego, the top cloud-based EHR and practice management platform for chiropractic care, ChiroTouch, unveiled a fresh integration with Fullscript. This collaboration will enable seamless incorporation of professional-grade supplement recommendations and lab ordering tools directly within the ChiroTouch platform.
